mapper.sql: ar.id, ar.user_id, ar.catalog_id, ac.catalog_code, ac.balance_direction, ar.record_name, ar.asset_kind, ar.asset_id, CASE WHEN ar.asset_kind = 'FUND' AND f.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('fund:', f.fund_code) WHEN ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' AND sm.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('stock:', sm.market, ':', sm.stock_code) ELSE NULL END AS asset_ref, CASE WHEN ar.asset_kind = 'FUND' THEN f.fund_code WHEN ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' THEN sm.stock_code ELSE NULL END AS asset_code, CASE WHEN ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' THEN sm.market ELSE NULL END AS asset_market, ar.amount, ar.currency, ar.remark, ar.status, ar.create_time, ar.update_time

CASE WHEN ar.asset_kind = 'FUND' AND f.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('fund:', f.fund_code) WHEN ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' AND sm.id IS NOT NULL THEN CONCAT('stock:', sm.market, ':', sm.stock_code) ELSE NULL END
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO asset_record (user_id, catalog_id, record_name, asset_kind, asset_id, amount, currency, remark, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{catalogId}, #{recordName}, #{assetKind}, #{assetId}, #{amount}, #{currency}, #{remark}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT FROM asset_record ar INNER JOIN asset_catalog ac ON ac.id = ar.catalog_id LEFT JOIN fund f ON ar.asset_kind = 'FUND' AND f.id = ar.asset_id LEFT JOIN stock_market sm ON ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' AND sm.id = ar.asset_id WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId} AND ar.id = #{id}

SELECT FROM asset_record ar INNER JOIN asset_catalog ac ON ac.id = ar.catalog_id LEFT JOIN fund f ON ar.asset_kind = 'FUND' AND f.id = ar.asset_id LEFT JOIN stock_market sm ON ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' AND sm.id = ar.asset_id WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId} AND ar.id = #{id} AND ar.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT FROM asset_record ar INNER JOIN asset_catalog ac ON ac.id = ar.catalog_id LEFT JOIN fund f ON ar.asset_kind = 'FUND' AND f.id = ar.asset_id LEFT JOIN stock_market sm ON ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' AND sm.id = ar.asset_id WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId} AND ar.id = #{id} FOR UPDATE

SELECT FROM asset_record ar INNER JOIN asset_catalog ac ON ac.id = ar.catalog_id LEFT JOIN fund f ON ar.asset_kind = 'FUND' AND f.id = ar.asset_id LEFT JOIN stock_market sm ON ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' AND sm.id = ar.asset_id WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId} AND ar.status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY ar.id DESC

SELECT FROM asset_record ar INNER JOIN asset_catalog ac ON ac.id = ar.catalog_id LEFT JOIN fund f ON ar.asset_kind = 'FUND' AND f.id = ar.asset_id LEFT JOIN stock_market sm ON ar.asset_kind = 'STOCK' AND sm.id = ar.asset_id WHERE ar.user_id = #{userId} AND ar.status = 'ACTIVE' AND = #{assetRef} ORDER BY ar.id DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM asset_record WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND catalog_id = #{catalogId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
